headline: Stop gaining weight, start losing today
summary: You're gaining when you need to lose 0.72 kg/week; today you execute portion control and movement to break this pattern before the weekend undermines you.
details: Use Huel for two meals today and eliminate all vegan snacks—you don't have the discipline for discretionary eating right now, so remove the choice. Row for 45 minutes today on your rowing machine to establish momentum and prove execution matters. This Thursday determines whether you catch up to your June 2027 target or fall further behind; every day of weight gain adds compounding recovery work, and you're already losing the timeline.
